name: Allosaurus
full_description:
# Allosaurus

**Type:** Large Beast (Dinosaur), Unaligned
**Armor Class:** 13
**Initiative:** +1 (11)
**Hit Points:** 51 (6d10 + 18)
**Speed:** 60 ft.
**Senses:** Passive Perception 15
**Languages:** None
**Challenge:** 2
**Experience:** XP 450; PB +2

| Ability | Score | Save |
| --- | ---: | ---: |
| Strength | 19 | 4 |
| Dexterity | 13 | 1 |
| Constitution | 17 | 3 |
| Intelligence | 2 | -4 |
| Wisdom | 12 | 1 |
| Charisma | 5 | -3 |

## Actions

Bite. Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) Piercing damage.

Claws. Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the allosaurus moved 30+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the Prone condition, and the allosaurus can make one Bite attack against it.

## Traits

Amphibious. The toad can breathe air and water.

Standing Leap. The toad’s Long Jump is up to 20 feet and its High Jump is up to 10 feet with or without a running start.

## Actions

Bite. Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) Poison damage. If the tar- get is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 12).

Swallow. The toad swallows a Medium or smaller target it is grappling. While swallowed, the target isn’t Grap- pled but has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, and it has Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the toad. In addition, the target takes 10 (3d6) Acid damage at the end of each of the toad’s turns. The toad can have only one target swallowed at a time, and it can’t use Bite while it has a swallowed target. If the toad dies, a swallowed creature is no longer Restrained and can escape from the corpse using 5 feet of move- ment, exiting with the Prone condition.
